creator: raimeetravel
caption:
Would I still travel to Europe right now? Here’s what I’m doing with my travel plans this year & how you should prepare! 

#jetfuel #travel #flights #europetravel

transcription.text: so apparently europe is running out of jet fuel and has already cancelled a ton of flights. as someone with a lot of europe travel plans this year, here's what i'm doing to make sure i'm prepared for any potential travel interruptions. number one, i'm getting cancelled for any reason travel insurance. this goes beyond what my travel credit cards already provide me with and beyond what i normally get for travel. number two, i'm booking as many flights as possible using my points and miles. it's a lot easier to get these reimbursed if something gets cancelled or if i need to make a last minute change. and finally, if you haven't booked any travel yet, i might be considering alternative travel destinations, so maybe south america, other places in north america, because asia and europe are the places being most affected. i still wouldn't let this stop me from booking a trip and i would definitely lock in prices now because the cost of airfare is only going to continue going up, at least in the short term. okay that's what i'm doing. i'll keep you posted on how my upcoming flights go.
